name: Gust of Wind
description: A Line of strong wind 60 feet long and 10 feet wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the duration. Each creature in the Line must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from you in a direction following the Line. A creature that ends its turn in the Line must make the same save (engine: end-of-turn save handler walks any creature ending its turn on a Gust line tile). The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles and similar unprotected flames in the area. Engine notes: the SRD 'movement closer costs 2 ft per 1 ft' directional Difficult Terrain is descriptive only; the 'Bonus Action on later turns to change direction' is descriptive only (the line direction is fixed at cast time).
